Petition Of X-Deft Sergio Azzolino To Compel Arbitration Re X-Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-10-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James W. Poindexter, Esq., POINDEXTER & DOUTRE, 251 Post Street, Suite 605, San Francisco, CA 94108, 415-398-5811, on behalf of cross-defendant and moving party Sergio Azzolino. Ronald K. Losch, Esq., LOSCH & EHRLICH, One California Street, Suite 2230, San Francisco, CA 94111, 415-956-8400, on behalf of plaintiff Metropolitan Glass. Michael Isaku Begert, Esq., BINGHAM McCUTCHEN, Three Embarcadero Center, San Franicsco, CA 94111-4067, 415-393-2693, on behalf of defendant California Craftsmen.

After argument the tentative ruling was modified: The motion to compel arbitration between cross-complainant and Azzolino was GRANTED. Parties may proceed with arbitration concurrently. Honorable Kevin M. McCarthy. Reported by Mitch Lyon CSR# 6840 (302/KMM/BC)

Motion To Stay X-Complaint Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-10-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James W. Poindexter, Esq., POINDEXTER & DOUTRE, 251 Post Street, Suite 605, San Francisco, CA 94108, 415-398-5811, on behalf of cross-defendant and moving party Sergio Azzolino. Ronald K. Losch, Esq., LOSCH & EHRLICH, One California Street, Suite 2230, San Francisco, CA 94111, 415-956-8400, on behalf of plaintiff Metropolitan Glass. Michael Isaku Begert, Esq., BINGHAM McCUTCHEN, Three Embarcadero Center, San Francisco, CA 94111-4067, 415-393-2693, on behalf of defendant California Craftsmen.

After argument the tentative ruling was modified: The Motion to Stay Cross-Complaint Pending Arbitration was GRANTED. Parties may proceed with arbitration concurrently. Honorable Kevin M. McCarthy. Reported by Mitch Lyon CSR# 6840 (302/KMM/BC)
